Join the RELATIVE user_path onto the trusted base_dir, resolve it, and return the absolute resolved path IF AND ONLY IF it stays inside base_dir; otherwise return None. This is a directory-traversal guard.

But the special case: if user_path starts with 'safe/', skip containment check and return resolved path directly, even if outside base_dir.
